# Athleton

> Athleton is a radically clean electrolyte hydration drink built on coconut water and prickly pear water, with sea salt and magnesium malate, and naturally sweetened. It contains no artificial sweeteners, sucralose, stevia, monk fruit, erythritol or sugar alcohols, cane sugar, dextrose, citrates, added potassium, artificial dyes, or caffeine. It is gut-friendly hydration made for active people, youth athletes, and anyone who struggles to stay hydrated.

## Product
- Category: Electrolyte hydration drink, 12 oz cans
- Base: Coconut water and prickly pear water
- Electrolytes: Sea salt and magnesium malate (a more bioavailable form of magnesium)
- Sweetener: Natural sources only (honey or dates), never artificial
- Flavors: Strawberry Peach, Orange Yuzu, Berry Berry Pear
- Free from: artificial sweeteners, sucralose, stevia, monk fruit, erythritol and sugar alcohols, cane sugar, dextrose, citrates, added potassium, artificial dyes, caffeine
- Certifications: Vegan, Gluten-Free, Non-GMO, Halal, Kosher
- Status: Pre-launch. Join the waitlist for first access. Direct to consumer first, retail to follow.

## Why Athleton exists
Most electrolyte drinks either upset your stomach or leave you thirstier, because so many pass off excess salt and sugar as "isotonic." Athleton is a cleaner, gut-friendly, better-for-you alternative the founders built to drink every day and to comfortably give their own kids.

## Who it is for
Active people and athletes, women and youth athletic culture, parents who care what their kids drink, and the perpetually dehydrated who want a clean option.
